creator: brooks@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please report clang crashes to the LLVM project.  In this case, please make sure to test on at least llvm50 if not llmv-devel before submitting unless you have a reason you must build with llvm40.  Please reopen if there is a fix upstream that I can apply.

PS. Make sure to mention which llvm version you are using when filing reports.  There are quite a lot of them.
